candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Malformed/concatenated label and not the current-assets total.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total for current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Component of cash, not the total preferred measure.
Component of cash, not the total preferred measure.

candidates.row_label: Cash balance as at end of the period Increase/ (decrease) in cash and cash
candidates.why: Cash-flow ending cash balance, but balance-sheet cash line is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet total cash line, preferred over cash-flow ending balance or component lines.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Not total current liabilities and wrong maturity bucket.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Clean current debt line explicitly excluding leases; best match to baseline STD.
Represents current maturities of long-term debt, but appears to overlap with the cleaner current-portion total.
Likely component within the current debt section and may overlap with current portion total; not preferred if total exists.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit non-lease short-term debt line. Did not include lease liabilities. Did not add 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' or current 'Borrowings' to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Direct current taxes payable line.
Exact PPE total/net line on the balance sheet; preferred over gross/accumulated components and lease-related ROU assets.

candidates.row_label: Property, plant and equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not the clean reported PPE amount.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related component, not preferred for baseline PPE total when direct PPE line exists.

variables.notes: Used the direct PPE line; avoided balancing and component rows.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Exact operating cash flow line; preferred for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash generated from operations before working capital changes
candidates.why: Intermediate subtotal before working-capital changes, not final operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Income tax paid Cash generated from operations before
candidates.why: Concatenated/malformed line, not the net operating cash flow total.

candidates.row_label: Cash generated from operations before working capital changes and tax payments - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not preferred reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the reported net cash flow from operating activities.
